decisions.decision: Provider cascade order: Claude → OpenAI → Groq → xAI → QuickBuild
decisions.rationale: Paid/best quality first, free tier as fallback, local last resort
Groq/xAI don't allow browser CORS for API keys

decisions.decision: Groq model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile, xAI model: grok-3-mini-fast
decisions.rationale: Best free models on each platform at time of implementation
